description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the viraweb/mblowfish-angularjs-builder:1.0.0 Docker image as default and defines a cache for node_modules. Add a build-project job that runs in the default stage, uses the node:8 image, runs only on master and develop branches, and executes the following script steps in order: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c "grunt test"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c "grunt release". It stores coverage/, doc/ and dist/ as artifacts for 1 day and extracts line coverage using the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. Then add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on build-project, runs only on master, uses the default image, and runs: ls -l; mkdir .public; mv coverage/ .public/coverage/; mv doc/ .public/doc/; mv .public public, publishing the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact retained for 90 days.
